notes: Structural assertions (title, sections, numbered steps) pass 100% in both configurations - they don't differentiate skill value
Second-person voice ('Your purpose is to...') consistently passes with new skill (3/3) and consistently fails with old skill (0/3) - this is the strongest discriminator
Italicized defined terms pass with new skill (1/1 tested) and fail with old (1/1 tested) - another clear differentiator
Retry bound assertion failed for with_skill image-orchestrator despite the spec containing retry logic - may be a regex sensitivity issue in the grader rather than a real failure
No timing/token data captured (subagent notifications were not available for this run)
